listings.name: Avenida Chill Hotel
listings.evidenceSummary: Multiple recent guests describe rooms cooling quickly at night, with no reports of throttled central AC in the seed set.
reviewExcerpts: The room got properly cold after a hot day outside.
Strong air conditioning and easy temperature control.
Excellent cooling overnight even during a warm week.
Central AC kept the room cool without noise.

listings.name: Alfama Cool Loft
listings.evidenceSummary: Seed evidence points to a dedicated split unit that guests could control directly.
reviewExcerpts: The split AC was powerful and cooled the loft fast.
Great cooling in the bedroom with the door closed.
A little warm in the kitchen, but the sleeping area stayed cool.

listings.name: Baixa Breeze Rooms
listings.evidenceSummary: Early evidence is limited but includes one useful cooling report and editorial monitoring.
reviewExcerpts: The portable AC helped, but it took a long time to cool the room.
Room was comfortable once the unit had been running.
